title: Brand Identity Project
description: A full identity for a small studio. Logo, colors, type, and a few rules so everything stays consistent.
client: A small studio getting ready to launch. They had a name and a rough idea, but nothing that tied it all together yet.

title: Social Campaign
description: A set of social posts built around one simple idea. Made to scroll-stop, easy to roll out.
client: A growing brand that wanted to show up better on social, without it feeling like every other feed out there.

title: Menu Design
description: A menu that's nice to read and nice to hold. Clean layout, warm colors, no clutter.
client: A neighbourhood spot with great food and a menu that didn’t do it justice. They wanted something warm and easy to read.

title: Event Campaign
description: Posters, tickets, and signage for an event. One look across everything, big and small.
client: An event that needed one consistent look across everything, from big posters down to the tickets in people’s hands.
